author: sofiabod
name: Packed Causal N-gram + Dirichlet Backoff Mixing
blurb: Single-pass causal score-first eval with packed 32K-bucket n-gram memory (8M training tokens, order 2-12) and Dirichlet posterior backoff mixing with count-confidence gating (gain=12). 2-layer 128d neural model (vestigial). No two-pass, no phrase cache, no TTT.
